mapper.select:
select count(*) FROM "USER" where status != 'N' and is_admin='N'
and user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and email like '%${searchText}%'
and phone like '%${searchText}%'

select u.user_id, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.create_date, u.status, mh.update_date as blockDate, mh."COMMENT" from "USER" u left outer join ( select * from(SELECT user_id, update_date, "COMMENT",
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY update_date DESC) AS rn FROM management_history order by update_date desc) ) mh ON u.user_id = mh.user_id and rn=1 where u.status != 'N' and u.is_admin='N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and u.email like '%${searchText}%'
and u.phone like '%${searchText}%'
order by u.create_date DESC

select count(*) from review r left outer join "USER" u on u.user_id = r.user_id and u.is_admin='N' left outer join book b on b.book_num = r.book_num where r.status != 'N' and u.status != 'N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and b.book_name like '%${searchText}%'

select r.review_num, r.review, r.create_date, r.status, r.score,r.user_id, r.book_num, b.book_name, u.nickname from review r left outer join "USER" u on u.user_id = r.user_id and u.is_admin='N' left outer join book b on b.book_num = r.book_num where r.status != 'N' and u.status != 'N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and b.book_name like '%${searchText}%'
order by r.create_date DESC

select count(*) from question q left outer join "USER" u on u.user_id = q.user_id and u.is_admin='N' where q.status != 'N' and u.status != 'N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and q.title like '%${searchText}%'

select q.q_index, q.title, q.create_date, q.status, q.user_id, u.nickname from question q left outer join "USER" u on u.user_id = q.user_id and u.is_admin='N' where q.status != 'N' and u.status != 'N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and q.title like '%${searchText}%'
order by q.create_date DESC

select count(*) from answer a left outer join "USER" u on u.user_id = a.user_id and u.is_admin='N' left outer join question q on q.q_index = a.q_index and q.state!='N' where a.status != 'N' and u.status != 'N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and q.title like '%${searchText}%'

select a.a_index, a.content, a.create_date, a.status, a.q_index, a_user_id, u.nickname from answer a left outer join "USER" u on u.user_id = q.user_id and u.is_admin='N' left outer join question q on q.q_index = a.q_index and q.state!='N' where q.status != 'N' and u.status != 'N'
and u.user_id like '%${searchText}%'
and u.nickname like '%${searchText}%'
and q.title like '%${searchText}%'
order by q.create_date DESC
